topics.title: Superman Movie Review and Radio History
topics.summary: The studio discusses the Superman film's narrative logic, a past performance by the band Hum, and various historical moments from their radio show.

topics.title: Cabbie Correspondence and Satellite Radio Merger
topics.summary: The studio discusses letters from an incarcerated former contributor named Cabbie and explores potential merger news involving Sirius and XM satellite radio.

topics.title: Rush Limbaugh Detained with Prescription Medication
topics.summary: The studio discusses the news of Rush Limbaugh being detained on a private plane from the Dominican Republic after being found with an unlabeled bottle of Viagra.

topics.title: Philanthropy and Government Corruption
topics.summary: The studio discusses the philanthropic efforts of Bill Gates and Warren Buffett as an alternative to government programs, while critiquing public corruption in social services and the management of war funds.

topics.title: Andrea's Sexual Encounter and Mental Health Struggles
topics.summary: The studio records a conversation where Andrea describes her sexual encounters with Casey, including details of their intimacy at Foxwoods, while also discussing her experiences with mental illness and auditory hallucinations.

topics.title: Media News and Caller Interactions
topics.summary: The show features a series of bizarre caller interactions, reports on a suspect turning himself in during a live broadcast, discussions regarding a website sale and upcoming television host changes, and segments on local news.

topics.title: Radio Show Internal Dynamics and Celebrity Rumors
topics.summary: The studio discusses internal staff dynamics regarding a television set gift, the recurring issue of a persistent caller named Craig Gasps, and rumors surrounding the arrest of Beetle Juice.

topics.title: Staff Conflict Over Chart Updates
topics.summary: The studio experiences a heated argument between staff members regarding the responsibility of updating and managing the daily top five music charts.

topics.title: Pigeon History and Humane Lobster Slaughter
topics.summary: The studio explores the historical significance of pigeons as communication tools and discusses the ethics of humane methods for slaughtering lobsters.

topics.title: Radio Show Commentary and Fan Interactions
topics.summary: The studio discusses listener feedback regarding Playboy evaluations, a new comedy song about Ralphie Cakes, the production of Howard TV segments, and various pop culture topics including celebrity news and television show quality.

topics.title: Upcoming Trip and Potential Balloon Flight
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation about an upcoming trip to Mexico, the prospect of a guest appearing on the show, and a potential balloon flight involving a costume.

topics.title: Radio Call with a Nurse
topics.summary: The show features a phone call with Valerie, a nurse and law student who discusses her career, physical fitness, and potential plans to meet Eric.

topics.title: Staff Competition for Panasonic Television
topics.summary: The studio staff debates the terms of a challenge to win a 50-inch plasma television, involving various outrageous stunts and physical dares.

topics.title: Contestants Compete for a Television Set
topics.summary: The studio hosts and guests debate which of several graphic and sexually explicit stunts is the most extreme as they prepare to let listeners vote on who must perform them to win a television.

topics.title: Gross-out Stunts and Listener Voting
topics.summary: The studio discusses various graphic and crude physical stunts involving the show's staff and guests to determine which will be featured on the website.

topics.title: Panasonic Television Contest
topics.summary: The studio hosts a contest where listeners vote on which participant will perform various degrading acts to win a 50-inch Panasonic plasma television.

topics.title: Service Dog Award and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The show covers the story of a service dog that won an award for calling 911 during its owner's medical emergency, the legal situation of a talented young robotics student from Senegal, and the departure of host Star Jones from The View.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Music Industry Updates
topics.summary: The studio covers various topics including celebrity legal issues, high-profile endorsement deals, the death of music producer Arif Mardin, and a discussion on satellite radio market consolidation.
